technicalClubs.name: CREATIVE CELL
technicalClubs.description: Focuses on design, UI/UX, and creative digital content.
technicalClubs.fullDescription: Creative Cell is dedicated to fostering design thinking and digital creativity among students. We conduct workshops on UI/UX design, graphic design, and digital marketing.

technicalClubs.name: E-CELL
technicalClubs.description: Promotes entrepreneurship and startup culture among students.
technicalClubs.fullDescription: E-Cell aims to nurture entrepreneurial spirit and provide mentorship to budding entrepreneurs. We organize pitch events, networking sessions, and startup showcases.

technicalClubs.name: Google Developer Groups
technicalClubs.description: Community for developers to learn Google technologies.
technicalClubs.fullDescription: GDG at our college brings together developers interested in Google technologies. We conduct sessions on Flutter, Firebase, Cloud, and Web technologies.

technicalClubs.name: INNOGEEKS
technicalClubs.description: Encourages innovation and technical problem solving.
technicalClubs.fullDescription: InnoGeeks is a hub for tech innovators. We conduct hackathons, coding contests, and innovation challenges to push boundaries.

technicalClubs.name: Kinesis Technical Society
technicalClubs.description: Focuses on robotics, automation, and engineering projects.
technicalClubs.fullDescription: Kinesis is the go-to place for robotics enthusiasts. We build robots, participate in national competitions, and mentor junior members.

technicalClubs.name: MLSA Kiet
technicalClubs.fullDescription: MLSA is Microsoft's official student community. We provide training on Azure, Office 365, and other Microsoft technologies.

technicalClubs.name: Saekiet
technicalClubs.fullDescription: Saekiet promotes technical excellence through projects, workshops, and competitions in various engineering domains.

technicalClubs.name: Technocrats
technicalClubs.description: Develops coding and software engineering skills.
technicalClubs.fullDescription: Technocrats is focused on improving coding skills. We conduct weekly coding sessions, DSA classes, and contest preparation.

technicalClubs.name: DSDL
technicalClubs.description: Focuses on digital systems and design learning.
technicalClubs.fullDescription: DSDL helps students master digital circuit design, VLSI, and hardware programming through hands-on workshops.

culturalClubs.name: Kiet Music Club
culturalClubs.fullDescription: Music Club is a platform for singers, instrumentalists, and music enthusiasts to perform and improve their skills.

culturalClubs.name: TEDxKIET
culturalClubs.description: Organizes TED-style talks and idea sharing events.
culturalClubs.fullDescription: TEDx brings inspiring speakers and innovative ideas to campus. We host quarterly TED-style events with diverse speakers.

culturalClubs.name: Pragmatic Fashion Society
culturalClubs.description: Focuses on fashion shows and styling.
culturalClubs.fullDescription: Fashion Society celebrates style and creativity through fashion shows, workshops, and styling sessions.

culturalClubs.name: kiet movie society
culturalClubs.description: For movie lovers and film discussions.
culturalClubs.fullDescription: Movie Society is for film enthusiasts. We organize movie screenings, film discussions, and documentary showcases.

culturalClubs.name: EK PRAYASS
culturalClubs.fullDescription: Ek Prayass focuses on social impact and community service. We conduct awareness campaigns and community projects.

culturalClubs.name: THE IMPECCABLES
culturalClubs.fullDescription: The Impeccables is a dance club for all dance forms. We perform at events and conduct dance workshops.

culturalClubs.name: Kavyanjali
culturalClubs.fullDescription: Kavyanjali celebrates literature and poetry. We conduct poetry slams, book discussions, and creative writing workshops.

culturalClubs.name: Spark Creations
culturalClubs.description: Creative arts and content creation club.
culturalClubs.fullDescription: Spark Creations is for artists and content creators. We conduct art competitions, workshops, and showcase creative works.
